steps.title: Identify the causal progression
steps.content: The passage traces a chain: circulation generates currents, and these currents then create a protective barrier. The blank needs a transition that marks the currents as the forward result of this sequence.

steps.title: Apply the consequential meaning
steps.content: “In turn” expresses consequence—the currents create the barrier. “Likewise” suggests similarity, “nevertheless” introduces contrast, and “in reality” merely emphasizes; none convey the causal progression. That matches choice A — A is correct.
